name: DoIP_UDPSendPort
title: DoIP_UDPSendPort
syntax: ong DoIP_UDPSendPort(char IPaddress[], dword port, dword payloadType, byte payload[], dword payloadLen);
description: Sends a DoIP PDU with valid layout to peer(s) as UDP frame. The configured DoIP version is used.

parameters.name: IPaddress
parameters.description: Send to this address, may be a broadcast address.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: Destination port for the UDP packet.

parameters.name: payloadType
parameters.description: Type to send, i.e. this can be any value. [0; 0xFFFF]

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The data following the generic DoIP header.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
